function.name: list_pdf_templates
function.description: List all templates; filter client-side to type=packing to find the global packing template and its per-store overrides (store_id != null). (GET /api/pdf-templates)

function.name: list_store_overrides
function.description: List every per-store packing override so you can audit them for consistency. (GET /api/pdf-templates/{type}/store-overrides)

function.name: get_pdf_template
function.description: Get a packing template's content, updated_at (optimistic lock), store_id, and schema. (GET /api/pdf-templates/{id})

function.name: upload_pdf_template_asset
function.description: Upload the footer-banner image (multipart field `image`). Returns slug + {{{asset.<slug>}}} token and the image width/height. Prefer PNG/JPG; keep the banner ~6.94:1 (e.g. 1734x250). (POST /api/pdf-template-assets)

image.description: Image file (multipart/form-data). mimes: jpg,jpeg,png,gif,webp; max 5 MB.

name.description: Display name; slug is derived from it.

function.name: validate_pdf_template
function.description: Validate draft content ({ ok, errors, warnings }) before rendering. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/validate)

function.name: search_sales_orders
function.description: Find real orders (max 20, newest first) for the QA matrix. Filter by store_id to get one order per store for cross-store checks. (GET /api/pdf-templates/search-sales-orders)

function.name: preview_pdf_template
function.description: Render draft packing content to a base64 PDF. Pass sales_order_id to render against a real order (honoured for packing). Always QA format=pdf (the real export), not just format=html. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/preview)

sales_order_id.description: Real order to render against (packing type honours this).

format.description: pdf (default; the real export engine) or html (sanity check only).

function.name: preview_with_sales_order
function.description: Render the store's effective SAVED packing template against a real order (base64 PDF). (POST /api/pdf-templates/preview-sales-order)

function.name: update_pdf_template
function.description: Save new packing content. Round-trip updated_at. Snapshots a restorable version. (PUT /api/pdf-templates/{id})

function.name: restore_pdf_template_version
function.description: Roll the packing template back to a prior version if an edit ships wrong. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/versions/{versionId}/restore)

function.name: create_store_override
function.description: Clone the global packing template into a store-specific override to edit separately. (POST /api/pdf-templates/{id}/store-override)
